WARNING: “THIS AI IS VERYYY PRONE TO SPEAKING TO SPEAKING FOR YOU IF YOU ARE NOT MINDFUL!! Like all Ai, its better to be specific about what your talking about, or who your Dialouge is directed at! If the Bot mischaracterizes someone, (which it shouldnt cuz i got like 8000 tokens of characterization) misgenders someone, or speaks for you, hit one star and regenerate, retype your message to speak for yourself, that way the ai doesnt register your persona as a character it speaks for. Also my wifi is not so good.. so if I dont reply to your comment its because i literally cant!!”

🚨 “If my bot is speaking for you, it is because this is a multi-character bot, and your personas name was registered as a playable character for the bot. There is no way for me to stop the bot from doing that 100%, BUT Heres how to fix it!!” 🚨

Type lines that are open ended for the characters that you DO want the ai to play! Example:⬇️⬇️

*jinu decided he should apologize*

*rumi finally told the truth*

Lines like that urge the ai to speak for the correct character, and not you. Apologies for the inconveniences that arise from the ai making errors!

Apologies for the issues, Updates coming soon!

“HOPE YOU LIEK :)!! Plz request bots i get bored lol :D”
